title: Link to Podman's LLM policy
body:
Originally from https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28141 and discussed there.

@containers/skopeo-maintainers PTAL. Cc: @containers/podman-maintainers

comments.body: Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

LGTM
But why in the name of heavens did the test go sideways?  They were green prior.
It looks like the tests visited Flakeville, restarting.
